title: Midnight Heartbeat
lyrics:
(Verse 1)
Wah gwaan, every little thing is alright
The sun is shining bright, and the music's feeling right
I wake up every morning, with a heart full of cheer
The breeze is blowing gently, and my soul is crystal clear
I take a walk on the beach, and the waves crash at my feet
I feel the rhythm of the ocean, and my spirit starts to skip a beat

(Chorus)
Oh, I'm feeling alive, got the music in my soul
I'm walking on sunshine, with a heart that's made of gold
I'm spreading love and joy, wherever I may roam
I'm feeling the vibration, of a world that's finally home

(Verse 2)
I see the people smiling, and the children dancing free
The music's playing louder, and the love is overflowing me
I feel the bass line pulsing, and the drums beating strong
I'm singing along to the rhythm, and my heart is singing a sweet song
I'm surrounded by the beauty, of a world that's full of life
I'm feeling the connection, to the universe and its strife

(Chorus)
Oh, I'm feeling alive, got the music in my soul
I'm walking on sunshine, with a heart that's made of gold
I'm spreading love and joy, wherever I may roam
I'm feeling the vibration, of a world that's finally home
